channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇳🇱🇺🇦⚔️ Dutch Combat Robot Plant Opens New Supply Pipeline for Ukraine
item.description: A new Dutch facility producing THeMIS unmanned ground vehicles for combat zones has delivered its first unit, with over 100 vehicles planned to support Ukrainian forces.

item.title: 🇷🇺🛢️💥 Russia Admits Oil Output Falling as Ukrainian Drone Strikes Hit Refineries
item.description: Deputy PM Novak confirmed declining crude production citing unscheduled repairs at refineries damaged by Ukrainian drone attacks, acknowledging sanctions and drone warfare impact.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱⚔️ Hezbollah Drone Struck IDF Northern Commander's Car in Lebanon Visit
item.description: A Hezbollah drone attack targeted IDF Northern Commander Rafi Milo's vehicle during a recent Lebanon visit, an attack that would have been a major strategic victory if successful.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇧🇭🇮🇷 Saudi Crown Prince Condemns Iranian Attacks on Bahrain
item.description: MbS expressed solidarity with Bahrain during a call with King Hamad, condemning Iranian attacks against the Gulf state amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱❌ Hezbollah Rejects Lebanon-Israel Ceasefire Agreement
item.description: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem rejected the proposed ceasefire, demanding a comprehensive truce and full Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon while warning northern Israeli settlements remain unsafe.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah rejects US-backed ceasefire with Israel, calls terms surrender
item.description: Lebanon's Iran-backed group rejected the ceasefire announced by Israel, Lebanon and the US, calling the terms humiliating. The deal would have created security zones excluding Hezbollah fighters from southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine strikes kill four in occupied Crimea, fuel shortages spread
item.description: Russian-backed officials report four killed in Ukrainian attacks on Simferopol and a commuter train near Kerch. Ukraine's drone campaign has caused fuel rationing across the peninsula, with strikes also hitting near St Petersburg.

item.title: 🇸🇴 Heavy gunfire in Mogadishu as Somalia election dispute escalates
item.description: Government forces and opposition fighters exchanged fire in the capital after the president extended his term by one year. The opposition called the extension unconstitutional and protesters were met with violence.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel approves 2,162 new settlement homes in occupied West Bank
item.description: Far-right Finance Minister Smotrich announced the expansion, saying it would prevent a Palestinian state. The move was condemned by the Palestinian Authority and is illegal under international law.

item.title: 🚀 NASA declares Mars Maven spacecraft dead after six months of silence
item.description: The spacecraft, which studied Mars' atmosphere for over a decade, went silent in December after spinning out of control. Four other orbiters will take over its relay duties for surface rovers.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇷🇺 French jets intercept Russian aircraft 11 times over the Baltics in one week
item.description: French warplanes were scrambled 11 times as part of NATO Baltic Air Policing Mission, with Frances armed forces spokesperson describing higher-than-usual Russian provocations amid ongoing Ukraine war tensions.

item.title: 🇸🇪🇪🇺 Sweden urges EU to tighten tourist visa rules for Russians
item.description: Swedens migration minister called for stricter EU rules on Russian tourist visas, saying it was insane that many Russians can still travel freely despite the ongoing war in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran foreign minister says no tangible progress in US talks
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said messages are still being exchanged with the US but no formal negotiations are underway, warning that any Israeli attack on Beirut would trigger full-scale resumption of war.

item.title: 🇺🇸💼 US will uphold tariff caps in trade deals with EU and Japan, trade chief says
item.description: US Trade Representative confirmed the US will respect tariff caps in trade agreements struck with the European Union, Japan and other countries, amid ongoing trade negotiations and tensions.

item.title: ⚔️ UNIFIL Peacekeeper Killed in Lebanon After Attack
item.description: A UN peacekeeper was killed after a UNIFIL position in southern Lebanon was attacked amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Gaza Death Toll Since Ceasefire Nears 1,000
item.description: 11 more Palestinians were killed in Gaza strikes in 24 hours as the death toll since the ceasefire began approaches 1,000. Israel continues to deepen its occupation.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Bank of Japan Expected to Raise Rates in June
item.description: The BOJ is expected to raise interest rates this month unless a sharp escalation in the Middle East conflict upends markets. Rising fuel costs from the energy shock are adding to inflation pressure.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden Seizes Ship Suspected of Illegally Exporting Ukrainian Grain
item.description: Sweden seized a vessel suspected of illegally exporting Ukrainian grain from Russian-occupied territories. This is the first time a foreign court has approved such a seizure following a Ukrainian request.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia arrests deputy minister in major anti-corruption sweep
item.description: Deputy Minister for Immigration Silmy Karim was arrested after 10 hours of questioning, one of several high-profile corruption cases this week including the former head of the president's free meals program.

item.title: 🇸🇴 Heavy gunfire in Mogadishu as Somalia election dispute escalates
item.description: Somali troops and opposition-allied militias exchanged fire in the capital after the president extended his term by a year, with opposition calling for protests and civilians fleeing the city.

item.title: 🏔️ Missing Everest guide found alive after six days
item.description: Dawa Sherpa, who went missing near the summit on May 29, was spotted crawling toward base camp by cleanup crews in what officials are calling a miracle survival.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Ex-Merkel Advisor Links German UN Security Council Loss to Israel Stance
item.description: A former advisor to Angela Merkel said Germany's steadfast support for Israel may have contributed to its failed bid for a UN Security Council seat, citing accusations of double standards from the international community.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Council Chief: Western Balkans Enlargement Is Key Geopolitical Investment
item.description: European Council President Antonio Costa called EU enlargement to the Western Balkans the bloc's most important geopolitical investment, signaling continued commitment to regional integration despite ongoing challenges.

item.title: 🇺🇦 All EU States Back Formal Accession Talks With Ukraine After Hungary Deal
item.description: All 27 EU member states approved opening the first cluster of accession negotiations with Ukraine following an agreement with Hungary on minority rights protections, clearing a major hurdle in Kyiv's path to EU membership.

item.title: 🇬🇱 Rubio: Greenland Is Part of Denmark "For Now"
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio's remarks about Greenland suggest Washington has not abandoned interest in the Arctic island despite Danish objections, raising new questions about US intentions.
